$comment_1: Halvren cost curve — copper. Scaffold per V3-3 sprint; data points to be populated by the principal from FY 2025 filings.
$comment_2: Schema per data point: { ticker, name, cost_metric_value, on_coverage, position_visible, source }. PRINCIPAL: do not invent. Sourced or omitted.
$comment_3: metric_label is rendered as the x-axis label on the chart. metric_short is the short form used in tooltips and bar labels. spot_value is rendered as a dashed horizontal line.
